questions.context_sentence: How do we make new friends?
questions.hint: make(制造) + friends(朋友)。主动去“制造”新的友谊，也就是“交朋友”。

questions.context_sentence: How do we get to know each other?
questions.hint: get(得到/变得) + to + know(知道)。“渐渐得到知道的过程”就是去深入“认识和了解”某人。

questions.prompt: I like music, and I ____ in the school band.
questions.context_sentence: I like music, and I play the guitar in the school band.
questions.hint: 固定搭配：play表示演奏乐器，在西洋乐器前必须要加定冠词the。

questions.context_sentence: I like music, and I play the guitar in the school band.
questions.hint: 固定搭配：play表示演奏乐器，在西洋乐器前必须要加定冠词the。

questions.context_sentence: I like music, and I play the guitar in the school band.
questions.hint: 固定搭配：play表示演奏乐器，在西洋乐器前必须要加定冠词the。

questions.prompt: So when your classmate stops talking, you can ____ and ask another question!
questions.context_sentence: So when your classmate stops talking, you can jump in and ask another question!
questions.hint: 动作联想：jump(跳) + in(进去)。在别人正聊得火热时，你突然“跳进去”他们的谈话圈子，生动地表达了“插话、加入聊天”的意思。

questions.context_sentence: So when your classmate stops talking, you can jump in and ask another question!
questions.hint: 动作联想：jump(跳) + in(进去)。在别人正聊得火热时，你突然“跳进去”他们的谈话圈子，生动地表达了“插话、加入聊天”的意思。

questions.context_sentence: So when your classmate stops talking, you can jump in and ask another question!
questions.hint: 动作联想：jump(跳) + in(进去)。在别人正聊得火热时，你突然“跳进去”他们的谈话圈子，生动地表达了“插话、加入聊天”的意思。

questions.prompt: ____ you like to be my friend?
questions.meaning: 想(用于礼貌地邀请)；将会
questions.context_sentence: Would you like to be my friend?
questions.hint: 谐音“五的”。“想”要买苹果，请给我拿“五的(would)”一斤那种甜的！

questions.prompt: 想(用于礼貌地邀请)；将会
questions.meaning: 想(用于礼貌地邀请)；将会
questions.context_sentence: Would you like to be my friend?
questions.hint: 谐音“五的”。“想”要买苹果，请给我拿“五的(would)”一斤那种甜的！

questions.context_sentence: Would you like to be my friend?

questions.context_sentence: Peter's full name is Peter Brown.
questions.hint: full(完整的) + name(名字)。一个完整的名字，就是你的“全名”。

questions.context_sentence: Peter's full name is Peter Brown.
questions.hint: full(完整的) + name(名字)。一个完整的名字，就是你的“全名”。

questions.context_sentence: Meimei is in Class 1, Grade 7.
questions.hint: 谐音“哥瑞的”。想象哥哥瑞恩(哥瑞的)的“年级”比我高。或者拆分g+rade(骑)，骑着车去上新的“年级”。

questions.context_sentence: Meimei is in Class 1, Grade 7.
questions.hint: 谐音“哥瑞的”。想象哥哥瑞恩(哥瑞的)的“年级”比我高。或者拆分g+rade(骑)，骑着车去上新的“年级”。

questions.context_sentence: Ella's last name is Miller.
questions.hint: last(最后的) + name(名字)。在英语习惯中，家族的姓氏总是放在“最后的”位置。

questions.context_sentence: Ella's last name is Miller.
questions.hint: last(最后的) + name(名字)。在英语习惯中，家族的姓氏总是放在“最后的”位置。

questions.prompt: Mr Smith, this is my new ____, Peter.
questions.context_sentence: Mr Smith, this is my new classmate, Peter.
questions.hint: 复合词：class(班级) + mate(伙伴/伴侣)。在同一个班级里一起学习的伙伴，就是你的“同班同学”。

questions.context_sentence: Mr Smith, this is my new classmate, Peter.
questions.hint: 复合词：class(班级) + mate(伙伴/伴侣)。在同一个班级里一起学习的伙伴，就是你的“同班同学”。

questions.context_sentence: Who's your class teacher?
questions.hint: class(班级) + teacher(老师)。负责管理整个班级的大老师，就是“班主任”。

questions.context_sentence: Who's your class teacher?
questions.hint: class(班级) + teacher(老师)。负责管理整个班级的大老师，就是“班主任”。

questions.context_sentence: Hui is her first name.
questions.hint: first(第一/最前面的) + name(名字)。在英语中，属于你个人的名字通常放在“最前面”。

questions.context_sentence: Hui is her first name.
questions.hint: first(第一/最前面的) + name(名字)。在英语中，属于你个人的名字通常放在“最前面”。

questions.context_sentence: Sorry, my mistake.
questions.hint: 词缀法：mis-(错误地) + take(拿)。你不小心“错误地拿”了别人的东西，这就是一个“错误/失误(mistake)”。

questions.context_sentence: Sorry, my mistake.
questions.hint: 词缀法：mis-(错误地) + take(拿)。你不小心“错误地拿”了别人的东西，这就是一个“错误/失误(mistake)”。

questions.context_sentence: Country.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：count(数) + ry(拼音：人员)。一个“国家”太大了，每次人口普查都需要去数一数(count)到底有多少人员(ry)。

questions.context_sentence: Country.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：count(数) + ry(拼音：人员)。一个“国家”太大了，每次人口普查都需要去数一数(count)到底有多少人员(ry)。

questions.context_sentence: Emma and Ella are twins.
questions.hint: 拆分记忆：t(形似两人) + win(赢)。“双胞胎”一起参加两人三足比赛，结果两个都赢了(win)。

questions.context_sentence: Emma and Ella are twins.
questions.hint: 拆分记忆：t(形似两人) + win(赢)。“双胞胎”一起参加两人三足比赛，结果两个都赢了(win)。

questions.prompt: Tom and I are both in the school ____.
questions.context_sentence: Tom and I are both in the school band.
questions.hint: 对比记忆：hand(手) vs band(乐队)。一个优秀的“乐队(band)”在演奏乐器时，需要每个成员都有一双非常灵巧的手(hand)。

questions.context_sentence: Tom and I are both in the school band.
questions.hint: 对比记忆：hand(手) vs band(乐队)。一个优秀的“乐队(band)”在演奏乐器时，需要每个成员都有一双非常灵巧的手(hand)。

questions.context_sentence: I like hot pot very much.
questions.hint: 组合词联想：hot(热) + pot(锅) = 火锅。装满热汤的容器就是“锅”。

questions.context_sentence: I like hot pot very much.
questions.hint: 组合词联想：hot(热) + pot(锅) = 火锅。装满热汤的容器就是“锅”。

questions.context_sentence: Her favourite food is Mapo tofu.
questions.hint: 音译词。英文中没有这个概念，直接采用了中文“豆腐”的拼音读法。

questions.context_sentence: Her favourite food is Mapo tofu.
questions.hint: 音译词。英文中没有这个概念，直接采用了中文“豆腐”的拼音读法。

questions.context_sentence: It's a parrot.
questions.hint: 对比联想：carrot(胡萝卜)和parrot(鹦鹉)只差一个字母。想象一只聪明的“鹦鹉(parrot)”最喜欢啃又脆又甜的“胡萝卜(carrot)”。

questions.context_sentence: It's a parrot.
questions.hint: 对比联想：carrot(胡萝卜)和parrot(鹦鹉)只差一个字母。想象一只聪明的“鹦鹉(parrot)”最喜欢啃又脆又甜的“胡萝卜(carrot)”。

questions.prompt: I like music, and I play the ____ in the school band.
questions.context_sentence: I like music, and I play the guitar in the school band.
questions.hint: 音译兼谐音：本身是外来词音译。联想 gui(拼音:鬼) + tar(谐音:他)。“鬼”才相信“他”会弹“吉他(guitar)”呢！

questions.context_sentence: I like music, and I play the guitar in the school band.
questions.hint: 音译兼谐音：本身是外来词音译。联想 gui(拼音:鬼) + tar(谐音:他)。“鬼”才相信“他”会弹“吉他(guitar)”呢！

questions.context_sentence: My favourite sport is tennis.
questions.hint: 拆分联想：ten(十) + nis(谐音：妮丝)。十个名叫妮丝的女孩在一起打“网球”。

questions.context_sentence: My favourite sport is tennis.
questions.hint: 拆分联想：ten(十) + nis(谐音：妮丝)。十个名叫妮丝的女孩在一起打“网球”。

questions.context_sentence: My page
questions.hint: 拆分：p(拼音：破) + age(年龄)。这本书的一“页(page)”都破损了，看来已经有很大的年龄(age)了。

questions.context_sentence: My page
questions.hint: 拆分：p(拼音：破) + age(年龄)。这本书的一“页(page)”都破损了，看来已经有很大的年龄(age)了。

questions.prompt: Read again and complete the table with the ____ from the posts.
questions.context_sentence: Read again and complete the table with the information from the posts.
questions.hint: 词根词缀：in(在里面) + form(表格) + ation(名词后缀)。开学报到时，“在表格里面”填写的全都是你的个人基本“信息(information)”。

questions.context_sentence: Read again and complete the table with the information from the posts.
questions.hint: 词根词缀：in(在里面) + form(表格) + ation(名词后缀)。开学报到时，“在表格里面”填写的全都是你的个人基本“信息(information)”。

questions.context_sentence: What are your hobbies?
questions.hint: 谐音“好比”。一个有趣的“业余爱好(hobby)”就“好比”是平凡生活中的美味调味剂，让日子变得有滋有味。
